textByHash.3623748755e875b04b3a7a164cadc8f8fc6c623c: Eeee, wha' shall I do! I'll mos' certainly lose tha job...
textByHash.626211d0df72863a09ceb2fd72dc592b49a8e5bf: I w-w-work... over yon sand pit... and weeell... I found... this... hand! T'were buried in't Sand!
textByHash.da4da3c3555d2e630975fe10dfde7232436a1e15: They's no' wha' they once was. Tha cap'ain o'the Guard spends near all o'the time drunk in yon pub.
textByHash.1a446bb0988edeaa4d2a1a1469f7155b6919c0d7: Weeellll... do yer think yer could 'elp me?
textByHash.11aa03f233571298e10a438311eea26bf94a00cd: ..... Nae, ye can 'ave the 'and as h'evidence.
textByHash.f5d2b39ae1a72a29fa509fb819c5088039f54bd0: P'raps tha smell will get t'Guard Cap'ain's nose out o'his beer fer 2 seconds!
textByHash.1533d9ae5bfee5925047841e6a1aa585852a1d3d: Did ye see yon Guard Capt'n 'bout hand?
textByHash.abf65a913b266ea97461a0c6a4852b20d41da4ae: So why you hangin' abou' 'ere then? Go ring t'bell at t'mage guild just over yonder!
textByHash.da913d0130e2e8e61f3902516e1f723c396da736: Tha's no' surprisin' with yer bag so full, come back when s'not.
textByHash.8b3b4852a85e7b4106f88a643b8f67aae8277d8c: Thank t'gods! I tho' I was bein invaded by undead 'ands from t'sand when I found this'un! Take i' to tha mage guild and ring tha' bell to talk ta someone.
textByHash.8ad01c27e92c1b2ccb5a7c814ae69c81d3632867: Sand! Lots o' sand! Me boss be Sandy o' Sandy's Sand Corp based in Brimhaven on tha isle of Karamja an' I hauls sand fr' there to yon sand pit.
textByHash.f59cf013e2c1f0c86f099d17d75755dd8e053913: I's looong harrrrd hours, bu' keeps me busy, y'know what tha say! 'Idle hands'r Zamorak's tools.'
textByHash.46c35fd5cc922a44cca7430fddbe8e27c17b9f64: Yer coul' see fer yerself iffen yer had space in yorn invent'ry, come back when yer do.
textByHash.2ae382ae5ebb12a00facc347b3c1dfc6fd4cceb1: Nae! See fer yersel', here's a copy o' me rota tha' be held a' head office - yer can looksee iffin ye talk t' Sandy, me boss.
textByHash.e2d096cfa73eaeae9c212bc45a5bf56c359613f6: Ey'up . Did yer see Sandy in Brimhaven 'bout me rota?
textByHash.e466548ac92f1563e485e49a98addf82aa01c85f: Lucky fer yorn tha' I's made a copy then ain't it, I's 'ave been given it to yer iffen you 'ad some space in yer invent'ry.
textByHash.259bdfee0fb9913c3138eb74e7a1c27a6c72c1e6: Is you stupid? I said I'd give ye another but yer bags be full!
textByHash.6ff82fbb5c3d2c6039945a6fa2bf6ec1d6a830a0: Lucky fer yorn tha' I's made a copy then ain't it, 'ere 'ave another.
textByHash.54259885f4acf732abcb1c7561884751b0f0f78d: Nae! Nae! I din't remember tha', bu'... hmmm, aye... tha' migh' be it...
textByHash.1c0fd344f604941aad9e05b154a6e80d6a5bd98a: I's all be tha wizard's fault! Tha magic leaks fr'm yon magic guild I tells yer! Tha's why this weirrrrd scroll appeareded a week ago!
textByHash.4f4acd5c5c36ebeb540b33dc98ed844e51e539bd: O'course , le's be 'avin'yon rota and 'ere be tha scroll, yer be takin' it back ta those inferrrnal wizards quick sharp!
textByHash.9bacca499ebbdce93041092b319ac2417a931929: I be hopin' tha search is goin' well... are tha wizard's owning up ta anythin' yet?
textByHash.4e7ed7e28c61ef02b0bd1ef5826fa72e2883875b: ME JOB! I'VE LOSTED ME JOB! 'ow c'n yer say tha' be good news?? Me wife'll tear me limb fr'm limb!
textByHash.60997456a16f7f7eb908da7433b82bdd55aa01c5: Bu' wha'll I be doin' wit' me day now! I be lovin' tha sand.
textByHash.18db7576c2f68f2b768ac95d16ba765632d92a55: I din't think so... bu' iffen yer ever need someone ta haul buckets o'sand 'round, ye be lettin' me know , I's can help yer!
textByHash.e8ee31446eb68a2ec7f36e03873aad5b79e9ebdc: Aye, give me a minute cause I be rushed off me feet!
textByHash.53667b7e6988e0eb0e76bf151b0306253b2f7ad9: Oh arr, no' too bad, though sometoimes, I could do wi' a second pair o' hands! I'll be gettin' on movin' them there buckets o' sand to yer bank!
textByHash.46c6be48d3b8975fdc238aab37ab56fc1eec24fc: I'll ge' on wi' movin' it. Thankee fer makin' sure Sandy go' it in t'neck fer 'is double dealin's!
textByHash.4c36891464cfd674cebff0a071aab012e3299d09: Eeee, ye've go' no free space in yon bank . Make some room 'tween the fishes 'n boots fore ye come back ta me.
textByHash.2a868c4c37090e38aa1a41bc0a060d59a10122af: Yep, I dropped it off a while ago. Mebbe come back tomorrow fer some more.
textByHash.c0c64ade6ca68ac7e130d16f3611b64253cf1bc5: Aye, when I take yer bucket o' sand to yer bank each day, I'll not bother ye wi' any messages 'bout it. Ye'll just find yer sand in there.
textByHash.c05232bf2e4a69fb82d068c746db54aed2bbbd56: Aye, when I takes yer bucket o' sand to yer bank each day, I'll drop ye a message ter tell yer 'bout it, so ye knows I been workin'!
textByHash.8804421ac9527ef0a26189b5b44edf014e760aca: Suits me! I be a wee bi' busy, an' I'll happily stop takin' sand to yer bank for ye. Come an' see me if ye changes yer mind.
textByHash.c15b02f3f8483b77ef765da3f9a304c9ce1bbcbb: Aye, ye bin a big help to me, an I'll be 'appy to take yer sand to yer bank.
